298 I4200_ALZHMR_CD I4200_ALZHMR_CD I4200 Active Diagnoses: Alzheimers Disease Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of Alzheimer's Disease in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
299 I4300_APHASIA_CD I4300_APHASIA_CD I4300 Active Diagnoses: Aphasia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of aphasia in the last seven days. -=Not
